title: commiphora orbicularis
intro: Commiphora orbicularis, also known as the African myrrh or round-leaved myrrh, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae, native to southern Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Commiphora orbicularis include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant's resin is used in various herbal preparations, such as topical creams, ointments, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties.
